entities.name: PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS
entities.description: A new seed-borne potyvirus isolated from groundnut that induces striping and mosaic symptoms

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea, the host plant infected by PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: USA
entities.description: Location where PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS was isolated from groundnut

entities.name: STRIPING
entities.description: Characteristic symptom induced by PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS in groundnut

entities.name: DISCONTINUOUS VEIN BANDING
entities.description: Symptom induced by PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS along the lateral veins of groundnut

entities.name: OAKLEAF MOSAIC
entities.description: Symptom induced by PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS in groundnut

entities.name: CHINA
entities.description: Origin of germplasm lines from which PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS was isolated

entities.name: SAP INOCULATION
entities.description: Method used to transmit PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS to various plant species

entities.name: CHENOPODIACEAE
entities.description: Plant family susceptible to transmission of PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS via sap inoculation

entities.name: LEGUMINOSAE
entities.description: Plant family susceptible to transmission of PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS via sap inoculation

entities.name: SOLANACEAE
entities.description: Plant family susceptible to transmission of PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS via sap inoculation

entities.name: CHENOPODIUM AMARANTICOLOR
entities.description: A plant species that serves as a good local lesion host for PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: APHIS CRACCIVORA
entities.description: Aphid species that transmits PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS in a non-persistent manner

entities.name: ELISA
entities.description: Serological method used to determine the relationship of PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS to other viruses

entities.name: BLACKEYE COWPEA MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: Virus serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: SOYBEAN MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: Virus serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: CLOVER YELLOW VEIN VIRUS
entities.description: Virus serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: PEPPER VEINAL MOTTLE VIRUS
entities.description: Virus serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: PEANUT MOTTLE VIRUS
entities.description: Virus not serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: POTATO Y VIRUS
entities.description: Virus not serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: TOBACCO ETCH VIRUS
entities.description: Virus not serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: PEANUT GREEN MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: Virus not serologically related to PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS

entities.name: POTYVIRUS
entities.description: The genus of virus to which PEANUT STRIPE VIRUS is identified
